title: Data Capture Hardening for discovery + runtime artifacts
summary: Normalize and harden token data capture across discovery events and runtime journal artifacts so analytics/policy can rely on consistent fields (score, liquidity, buy/sell ratio, age, route state, exit value, zombie classification, and blocked/recovery signals). Changes are additive metadata only; no trading behavior changes.
why_safe: Discovery changes only add/normalize emitted metadata for candidate_accepted/candidate_rejected; acceptance logic is unchanged.
Trader changes only enrich persisted journal decision metadata at persistence time; execution sizing, routing, and safety checks are unchanged.
All new fields are explicit (including nulls) and do not remove existing metadata keys.
commit_message: Harden runtime data capture for token analytics and policy
notes_for_cursor: Normalized fields added primarily under candidate events (discovery) and journal decision metadata (trader persistence). Focused tests assert presence of required normalized keys.
